[[Yeoman/Legends|Yeoman]] '''Legassi''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] crewmember onboard the ''[[Adamantine]]'', where he died of the [[Death Seed]] plague in [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]].

{{Char-stub}}
